title: Sepsis Bundle Quick Reference
body: Door-to-antibiotic targets, lactate clearance, and fluid resuscitation thresholds.

title: POCUS in Trauma
body: EFAST windows, probe selection, and pitfalls in the undifferentiated hypotensive patient.

title: Massive Transfusion Protocol
body: Activation criteria, 1:1:1 ratios, and calcium replacement during resuscitation.

title: Airway Checklist
body: Pre-intubation checklist, backup device placement, and post-intubation confirmation.

title: ABEM ConCert Study Plan
body: Rosh Review pacing, Hippo Education modules, and the biweekly study-group topic rotation.

title: Shift Handoff Standard
body: Structured handoff for the trauma team at the 7A and 7P shift change.
